channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrat Frederica Wilson announces retirement after denying speculation she would leave Congress
item.description: Rep. Frederica Wilson, a longtime Trump critic known for her distinctive cowboy hats, announced she will not seek reelection to her Florida House seat.

item.title: White House criticizes Getty over new blue pool coating
Bondi declines to answer questions on Trump and Epstein files
item.description: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi refused to answer questions Friday about President Donald Trump's involvement in the release of the Jeffrey Epstein case files.

item.title: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi praises Trump administration's handling of Epstein files
item.description: In a prepared statement for a House committee interview, former U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi defended the Trump administration's release of the Epstein case files.
